case_title: BERLIANT & ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. JEFFERSON CURRY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERLIANT & ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BERLIANT & ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY, JEFFERSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY VICTOR BERLIANT--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $195.00) SERVED AUG-27-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY, JEFFERSON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERLIANT & ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURRY, JEFFERSON $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,725.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
